title: EventsMediaIndexedV1
description: Worker → API: media indexing succeeded, embedding stored. Stream `events.media.indexed.v1` per docs/conventions/events.md:27.

media_id.description: ULID matching the `media_id` on the originating `jobs.media.index.v1` message.

embedding_ref.description: Opaque pointer into the pgvector column populated per ADR 0009. Encoding decided by slice 6/9.

frames.description: Number of embedded frames — 1 for photo, N for video-keyframe per ADR 0007:48-54.

embedder_model_id.description: Same field name as `/healthz` `embedder.model_id` (api.md:19-20) to avoid naming drift between control-plane and data-plane.
